transcript:
Agent: Hi, this is David from Pain Management and Neurology. Is this Robert?
Caller: Yeah, speaking.
Agent: Hey Robert, I'm calling to remind you about your follow-up appointment coming up. Looks like you're scheduled for this Thursday at 10 AM.
Caller: Oh right, yeah. Which location is that at again?
Agent: Uh, let me check... okay, that's at our Bakersfield office on Chester Avenue.
Caller: Got it. Hey, while I have you — I've been having more back pain than usual. Should I be worried?
Agent: I'm not a doctor so I really can't give you medical advice on that, but I'd definitely bring it up with Dr. Kim when you come in Thursday. She'll be able to assess what's going on.
Caller: Fair enough. Thanks for the call, David.
Agent: No problem, Robert. We'll see you Thursday. Take care!
Caller: Thanks, bye.
